chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 375 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.7233/2020 (I Rule 10) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5168/2020 (I Rule 10) 4. For hearing of CMA No.1862/2020 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 31-08-2021 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Samiullah Soomro, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition was filed seeking the following prayers: a) To direct the respondents to immediately formulate the pension rules, funds and to pay the pension to the retiring employees forthwith. b) That this Honorable Court may be pleased to direct the respondent to pay the pension to the retiring employees since appointment as per Employees Social Security Institution and other Provincial Separate Statutory bodies like wise Boards of Intermediate and secondary education, Urdu Dictionary Board, as well different Universities of Sindh. c) That this Honorable Court may be pleased to direct the respondents to treat the petitioners equally and discrimination in pension of petitioners is illegal, capricious, void ab-initio, malafide unconstitutional barbaric and run contrary to the principle of natural justice. As to prayer (a) is concerned, today statement has been filed along with copy of gazette notification dated 18-06-2021, whereby the rules for Sindh Workers Welfare Board Employees (Service) Rules, 2021 have C. P. No. D – 375 of 2020 2 been enforced. Rule 103 deals with the issue of entitlement, service benefits including pension.

D – 375 of 2020 2 been enforced. Rule 103 deals with the issue of entitlement, service benefits including pension. To that extent, the petition stands satisfied. Insofar as other prayers are concerned, it appears that they are generalized in nature and do not pertain to the individual cases of the petitioners, therefore, they cannot be entertained. If any of the petitioner is aggrieved in his/her individual capacity, he/she may seek appropriate remedy. With these observations, the petition is disposed of along with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
